name: qgis2grist
description: QGIS to Grist importer: parses qgis2web/QGZ/QField/GPKG exports, creates Grist table schema (labels, Choice from ValueMap, Ref from QGIS relations) and imports geographic data

grist.name: QGIS → Grist Importer
grist.description: Import QGIS layers (qgis2web .zip/.html, .qgz, QField) directly into Grist with automatic schema creation
